title: HG Limescale Remover Foam Spray Super Powerful, Bathroom & Kitchen Cleaner – 500ml
features: HG Limescale Remover spray: Multi surface bathroom cleaner spray foam removes limescale and other deposits from tiles, shower doors, cubicles, bath screens, shower heads, taps or even kitchen worktops
Effective anti limescale foam spray: The limescale remover all surface cleaner works as a bath cleaner, shower cleaner, chrome cleaner and verdigris stain remover spray, reducing limescale build up
Super powerful bathroom cleaning products: Highly concentrated bath and shower spray, safe for multi surface materials in the bathroom and home, leaving a professional grade finish every time
Easy to use: Simply spray on and wipe away using a damp cloth, to restore your shower head to its ideal flow. Fast acting and chrome, stainless steel, ceramic, glaze, glass and plastic surface safe
Includes: 1 x HG Limescale Remover spray, 500ml. Discover the full range of HG professional household cleaning products, with HG Mould Remover, multi purpose cleaner sprays and all surface cleaners
description: Product Description HG Limescale Remover Foam Spray Super Powerful was developed to remove stubborn limescale thoroughly and quickly, leaving surfaces gleaming again. This effective and easy to use limescale cleaner leaves a wonderful shine after use. The extremely powerful multi surface cleaner removes stubborn limescale, which creates a dull glaze, from tiles, shower cubicles, plastic bathtubs, washbasins, taps, showerheads and kitchen worktops. Removing persistent scale quickly, easily and thoroughly, the limescale cleaner and remover spray produces a full foam that guarantees a longer active time. It’s safe to use on chrome, glaze or grouting, making it the ideal scale-removing sink, tap, shower and bath cleaner. Discover HG professional's range of specialist multi surface cleaning products and all purpose cleaner sprays for your home, office and outside space. Includes: 1 x HG Limescale Remover Foam Spray Super Powerful, 500ml Instructions: 1. Perform a patch test to ensure the surface is safe to use the spray on. 2. Squirt HG Limescale Remover Spray foam onto the surface that needs treatment and leave it to work for maximum 5 minutes. 3. Then rinse or wipe the surface with a damp cloth. 4. Use in conjunction with HG Grout Cleaner and HG Toilet Cleaner (sold separately) for a sparkling clean bathroom. Ingredients cleaner Safety Warning Attention: do not apply hg 'scale away' on marble, or other types of calciferous natural stone or other non-acid resistant surfaces. After spraying the liquid onto persistent scale we recommend using a bathroom sponge. For enamelled baths use hg 'professional limescale remover' diluted 1:10 in water. Ventilate well during use. Medical personnel can request the data sheet via +31 (0)36 54 94 777 the consumer's information sheet can be obtained via www.hg.eu danger h302- harmful if swallowed. H314- causes severe skin burns and eye damage. P101- if medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. P102- keep out of reach of children. P270- do not eat, drink or smoke when using this product. P280- wear protective gloves and eye protection. P303+p361+p353- if on skin (or hair): take off immediately all contaminated clothing. Rinse skin with water [or shower]. P305+p351+p338- if in eyes: rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. Contains: phosphoric acid einecs: 231-633-2. Box Contains 1 x HG Scale away 3xStronger Manufacturer Contact Information Made by: HG International B.V., P.J.
